template.name: Advanced JSON Data Processing Pipeline
template.description: Comprehensive JSON data processing template with schema inference, nested data flattening, complex transformations, and validation. Handles large JSON files, arrays, and complex nested structures.

configuration.content: {{JSON.stringify({ file_name: file_name, structure_analysis: structure_analysis, transformation_stats: transformation_stats, schema_confidence: schema_confidence, field_metrics: field_metrics, processing_timestamp: now() }, null, 2)}}

primary_key_fields.description: Fields to use for generating unique record IDs

validation_strict.description: Whether to reject files that fail schema validation

documentation.setup_guide:
1. Configure input directory for JSON files
2. Set up database connections (PostgreSQL/MongoDB)
3. Define transformation rules and field mappings
4. Configure schema output and archival directories
5. Set up notification channels
6. Test with sample JSON files
7. Monitor processing and schema confidence
use_cases: API response data processing and normalization
Log file analysis and structured data extraction
IoT sensor data processing from JSON formats

troubleshooting.low_schema_confidence: Review data quality and increase sample size
troubleshooting.nested_data_issues: Adjust flattening configuration or array handling
troubleshooting.type_inference_errors: Define explicit type conversions in transformation config
troubleshooting.performance_issues: Reduce batch size or optimize transformation rules
